name: Randomized phase 2 ambroxol trial in Parkinson disease dementia
summary: A 52-week randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase 2 trial of low-dose or high-dose ambroxol in mild to moderate Parkinson disease dementia.
population: Patients older than 50 years with Parkinson disease dementia and mild to moderate dementia

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Lysosomal Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in Patients older than 50 years with Parkinson disease dementia and mild to moderate dementia. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
